SpawnGoreHandler.description: Spawns gore prefabs (blood, debris, gibs) when skills deal damage. Iterates Count times spawning random prefabs with physics.

0x58.name: Prefabs
0x58.description: List of gore prefabs to randomly spawn. PrefabListTemplate stores array at its own 0x58 offset.

0x60.name: Count
0x60.description: Number of gore pieces to spawn per trigger

0x64.name: Speed
0x64.description: Launch velocity magnitude for gore physics

0x68.name: MinScale
0x68.description: Minimum random scale for gore prefabs

0x6C.name: MaxScale
0x6C.description: Maximum random scale for gore prefabs

behavior.trigger: OnUse callback when skill is activated
spawn_logic: Gets target tile position from skill context
2. Clamp Y component to positive (upward spray only)
3. Get random prefab from Prefabs list
4. Instantiate at tile position + offset (i * spacing)
6. Add Gore component and call Launch()
behavior.gore_launch_params: Uses MinScale/MaxScale for random sizing, Speed for velocity

SpawnPrefabHandler.description: Simple prefab spawner that instantiates a single GameObject at the target tile position.

0x18.name: Data
0x18.description: Pointer to SpawnPrefab template data (inherits BaseEffect)

0x58.name: Prefab
0x58.description: The prefab to instantiate at target tile

behavior.trigger: OnUse callback when skill targets a tile
spawn_logic: Gets tile world position via BaseTile.GetPos()
Instantiates prefab at tile position with identity quaternion
behavior.notes: Simplest spawn handler - no physics, no count, single instantiation

SpawnObjectTileEffectHandler.description: Spawns tactical objects (cover, obstacles, deployables) as tile effects with lifetime management.

data_fields_from_0x58.note: SpawnObjectTileEffect inherits TileEffectTemplate which has fields starting at 0x78

0x8C.name: HasLifetime
0x8C.description: Whether effect expires after MaxLifetime rounds

0x90.name: MaxLifetime
0x90.description: Number of rounds before effect expires (if HasLifetime)

0x98.name: Prefab
0x98.description: Visual prefab to spawn for the object

0xA0.name: DestroyMode
0xA0.description: How to destroy prefab when effect ends

0xA8.name: DestroyDelay
0xA8.description: Seconds to wait before destroying prefab after effect ends

0xAC.name: BlocksLineOfSight
0xAC.description: Whether spawned object blocks line of sight through tile

lifecycle: Handler created with data reference at 0x28
Tile effect manages spawned object lifetime
On removal, respects DestroyMode for cleanup
Waits DestroyDelay seconds before final destruction

SpawnTileEffectHandler.description: Handler for spawning generic tile effects (fire, poison, etc)

0x58.name: Event
0x58.description: When to trigger the tile effect spawn

enum_values.1: OnTileChanged - When actor moves to new tile

0x60.name: EffectToSpawn
0x60.description: The tile effect template to instantiate

0x68.name: ChanceAtCenter
0x68.description: Base spawn probability (0-100) at center tile

0x6C.name: ChancePerTileFromCenter
0x6C.description: Probability modifier per tile distance from center

0x70.name: DelayWithDistance
0x70.description: Spawn delay multiplied by distance from center

TileEffectTemplate.description: Base class for all tile effect configurations
TileEffectTemplate.note: SpawnObjectTileEffect and other tile effects inherit this

PrefabListTemplate.description: Container for weighted random prefab selection

Gore.description: Component added to spawned gore prefabs for physics simulation

ghidra_comments_added.comment_summary: Documents field layout and spawning behavior
Documents handler initialization and data pointer at 0x28
Documents all gore data fields 0x58-0x6C with defaults
Documents Event enum and probability fields
Documents complete base class field layout 0x78-0xB0
